name: committer-proxy
description: Generic GitHub OAuth + commit proxy (Cloudflare Worker).

GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Your GitHub App's private key, PKCS#8 PEM. Paste the whole -----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY----- block (from the setup page).

GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Your GitHub App's OAuth client secret (from the setup page).

SESSION_SECRET.description: A long random string used to sign session JWTs. Use the value generated on the setup page.

GITHUB_APP_ID.description: Your GitHub App's numeric App ID (from the setup page).

GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.description: Your GitHub App's OAuth Client ID, e.g. Iv23li... (from the setup page).

REPO_OWNER.description: Your GitHub username — owner of the repo the Worker commits to.

REPO_NAME.description: The repo the Worker commits to, e.g. <you>.github.io.

REPO_BRANCH.description: Default branch to commit to (usually main).

SITE_URL.description: Your site URL that login redirects back to, e.g. https://<you>.github.io.

ALLOWED_LOGINS.description: Comma-separated GitHub logins allowed to commit. Usually just your username.

ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated browser origins allowed to call the Worker (CORS), e.g. https://<you>.github.io,http://localhost:8000.
